name: vibe-prompt-mcp
description: Fix your vibe coding prompts before they reach the AI. Scores and rewrites across 4 dimensions — no API key, no server, just npx. Now with codebase-aware context injection for design, database, API, auth, testing, and state management.

tools.name: optimize_prompt
tools.description: Optimize a prompt across clarity, specificity, completeness, and efficiency dimensions. Optionally discovers and injects project-specific context when projectRoot is provided.

tools.name: score_prompt
tools.description: Score a prompt across 4 dimensions with detailed breakdown and messaging.
